description_long: This is a pair of fingerless gloves with a striking, urban-inspired design. The gloves are predominantly dark red and black, featuring a bold, stylized skull graphic in white and red on the back of the hand, along with blocky, light blue lettering across the knuckles. The material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and fabric, with reinforced knuckle areas and visible stitching for durability. The gloves have a rugged, worn look, suggesting they are intended for heavy use or as part of a streetwear or combat aesthetic. The interior side is plain and dark, while the exterior is adorned with graphic elements and raised details. The gloves are designed to fit snugly and provide protection while allowing finger dexterity.
description: Fingerless gloves with a dark red and black color scheme, featuring a bold skull graphic and blue lettering on the knuckles. The design is rugged and urban, with reinforced knuckles and visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the skull graphic and blue block lettering on the knuckles, with visible reinforced areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the finger holes and the rounded, padded knuckle reinforcements.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, dark palm side and the fingerless design.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the raised knuckle details, skull graphic, and the overall rugged texture.
attribute_logo: stylized skull graphic on the back of the hand
attribute_pattern: graphic with skull and block lettering
